notes: Often merged with cash in IFRS taxonomy
Not applicable in US (no VAT) or SA (Zakat-based)
Only post-IFRS 16 (2019). Many developing markets still not implemented
Not always recognized under local GAAP (VE excluded)
Rates: US 21%, MX 30%, BR 34%, CN 25%, VN 20%, SA Zakat-based
VN: no deferred tax concept in VAS
VE: restated for inflation under IAS 29
RU: mandatory legal reserve 5% of capital
